mapper.select: SELECT s.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, SUM(s.amount) AS amount FROM u_leaderboard_income_submission s LEFT JOIN u_user u ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE s.period_month = #{periodMonth} AND s.audit_status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY s.user_id, u.nickname ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
